success.description: True when the daemon finished this transcript successfully (agent loop completed in a good state). False on failure, cap, or invalid result; the host must not treat directives as valid to apply when false.

summary.description: Human-readable summary when the agent ends the loop (control_done); for host UI.

applyBatchId.description: Correlates host apply reports with daemon-held intents; present when success is true and directives is non-empty.
